# Firmcraft

> Firmcraft is an AI consulting firm for small and mid-sized businesses, based
> in the Springfield, Illinois area and serving central Illinois, Houston,
> Texas, and US clients remotely. Services: fixed-fee AI readiness assessments
> ($4,500–$8,500, 2–3 weeks), AI implementation and ERP integration (Microsoft
> Dynamics 365 Business Central, NetSuite, Acumatica), managed AI operations,
> and Firmcraft Operator — a managed AI employee that works in Slack or
> Microsoft Teams, from $399/month. CPA-led, with deep ERP implementation
> experience. Sovereign by default: deployments run on the open-source Hermes
> agent platform and client data stays in the client's environment.

Firmcraft serves two kinds of buyers: owner-operated service businesses
(HVAC, plumbing, electrical, tree care, dental and medical practices, law and
CPA firms) that want a done-for-you AI operator, and finance- or
operations-led mid-market companies ($10M–$500M revenue) running ERPs that
want AI implemented against their real systems. All pricing is published.

## Services
- [Services overview](https://firmcraft.ai/services): Assess → Build → Operate → Advisory; fixed-fee packages
- [Firmcraft Operator](https://firmcraft.ai/managed-ai): managed AI employee in Slack/Teams, $399–$1,499/mo by team size
- [Pricing](https://firmcraft.ai/pricing): all prices published — Operator plans, assessment, build packages, retainers
- [AI office manager for Houston contractors](https://firmcraft.ai/houston): phones, scheduling, dispatch, invoicing for HVAC, plumbing, electrical, roofing
- [Playbooks library](https://firmcraft.ai/playbooks): 40 production AI playbooks across trades, healthcare, professional firms, B2B
- [Integrations](https://firmcraft.ai/integrations): 112 tools — QuickBooks, NetSuite, Eaglesoft, Jobber, ServiceTitan, Clio, HubSpot, and custom connectors

## Trust
- [Security & sovereignty](https://firmcraft.ai/security): per-firm deployment, audit logs, BAAs, no training on client data
- [Methodology](https://firmcraft.ai/methodology): five phases inherited from ERP implementation discipline
- [About](https://firmcraft.ai/about): founder background — CPA, Big-4 audit, industry controller, Microsoft BC consultant
